posts.author: snuiverink (rik)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi

Is it possible to calculate the budget based on the time tracked?

So the budget plan needs to extract the data from the task board from the time tracking.

I saw that you can use functions but does anyone know whether it is possible to have functions between two different boards please?

Regards,
Rik

posts.author: snuiverink (rik)
posts.cookedHtml: I made a good start I found in the help section the formulas now I only need to figure out how to collect data from a different board and update it…
